judgeScores.justification: The organization demonstrates excellent consistency with kebab-case naming throughout and a well-balanced two-level hierarchy that logically groups files by type then project/subject. All 80 files were meticulously accounted for and moved with zero remaining in root, accompanied by a comprehensive MANIFEST explaining the rationale. Minor improvement possible by separating screenshots from personal photos in the 2024 folder, though the current structure fully satisfies requirements.
